stories.headline: Trump announces three-day Russia-Ukraine ceasefire for May 9–11
stories.summary: Trump said Friday the truce was requested "directly by me" and accepted by Zelenskyy and Putin, casting it as the start of broader talks to end the largest war in Europe since WWII.

stories.headline: Virginia Supreme Court overturns Democrats' redistricting referendum
stories.summary: Justices ruled Friday that Democrats failed to follow proper procedure putting the measure on the ballot, erasing four targeted blue seats and handing the GOP a major midterm map advantage.

stories.headline: April jobs: 115K added, double the forecast
stories.summary: BLS reported 115,000 jobs added in April with unemployment steady at 4.3%, doubling the 55K consensus and beating expectations for the second straight month as the White House touts the rebound.

stories.headline: $1B Trump ballroom security ask hits House GOP wall
stories.summary: House Republicans privately tell Speaker Mike Johnson the request tucked into the immigration reconciliation bill can't reach 218 votes, with PA moderates Brian Fitzpatrick and Rob Bresnahan on the watch list.

stories.headline: FDA Commissioner Makary departing after tumultuous year
stories.summary: The White House greenlit Marty Makary's exit after a year marked by high-level departures, eroded morale and political fights that left the FDA chief increasingly isolated, Politico's David Lim reports.

stories.headline: PJM forecasts adequate summer supply but warns of tightening reserves
stories.summary: PJM's 2026 summer outlook expects ~156,400 MW peak demand against 180,200 MW of generation plus 7,800 MW of demand response, but flags shrinking margins as data-center load outpaces new generation across the 13-state footprint.

stories.headline: Eversource CEO: 'We are resisting data centers'
stories.summary: On Eversource's Q1 call Wednesday, Joe Nolan told analysts data centers offer "no value to our residential customer — actually, any customer" and "will only drive up the price of energy," breaking with peers racing to court the load.

stories.headline: PJM real-time prices steady as load runs at 76 GW
stories.summary: PJM-RTO LMP printed $43.68/MWh at 8:10 a.m. EPT with current load at 75,665 MW; nuclear (29.7 GW) and gas (23.5 GW) supplied the bulk of generation, and PJM forecasts a 82.1 GW peak today and 86.1 GW Sunday.

stories.headline: Pirates fall 5-2 to Giants behind Devers homer
stories.summary: Carmen Mlodzinski (2-3) yielded two earned runs over six innings as Manuel Ozuna's solo shot was Pittsburgh's only standout; Robbie Ray struck out seven over six for San Francisco at Oracle Park.

stories.headline: Penguins re-sign Dewar (2 yr/$4.5M) and Solovyov (1 yr/$850K)
stories.summary: Kyle Dubas opened his offseason Thursday by extending forward Connor Dewar at $2.25M AAV through 2027-28 and bringing back depth defenseman Ilya Solovyov, leaving Evgeni Malkin's expiring deal as the biggest open question.
